lago_waterfront.honest_note: Condo at 56 Annie Craig managed by FirstService. No single leasing office - browse Condos.ca and book viewings with individual realtors.

markwood_4365.current_promo: Check website (purpose-built rental, frequent move-in incentives)
markwood_4365.honest_note: BEST FOR ER SCHEDULE - weekend hours 10-6 both Sat AND Sun, weeknights to 7pm. Direct on-site leasing line. Call 647-956-9141 or email.

arc_erin_mills.current_promo: Skyrise Rental Residences from ~$2,950 (Daniels purpose-built rentals)
arc_erin_mills.honest_note: Daniels Gateway is a proper purpose-built rental program. Use the danielsgateway.com 'Book a Tour' form or call 905-273-9333.

reid_drive.current_promo: Check listing portal (InterRent runs rotating concessions)
reid_drive.honest_note: InterRent corporate. Use the 'Book a Tour' button on irent.com - chat widget gets faster responses than the 1-866 line.

lakewood_ii_1285.honest_note: Direct on-site number. Homestead is institutional - limited evening/weekend availability. Book early in the day.

lakeshore_2335.current_promo: 1 Month Free + $1000 Move-In Bonus (active per latest listing)
lakeshore_2335.honest_note: Park Property Management. Active move-in promo right now - good time to call. Weekday-only hours.

lakeshore_2495.current_promo: Check MetCap listing - frequent first-month-free deals
lakeshore_2495.honest_note: GREAT HOURS for ER schedule - open 7 days, evenings to 8pm. BUT MetCap is ACORN's 2025 Worst Landlord. Treat tour as recon, not commitment.

lakeshore_206e.next_open_house: Private tours only - book via website form
lakeshore_206e.honest_note: Signet Group manages. Use website 'Schedule a Tour' form - they respond same-day during weekdays. No walk-ins.

waterford_tower_2645.honest_note: ADDRESS NOTE - this is 2645 Battleford Rd Mississauga (not Kipling). QuadReal-managed = institutional, responsive. Use RentCafe 'Schedule a Tour' button to bypass phone tag.

143_stephen_drive.honest_note: GREAT 7-day evening hours. BUT MetCap is flagged AVOID by ACORN. Tour with skepticism - ask current tenants about pests and response times before signing.

65_windermere.current_promo: 1 MONTH FREE RENT (per Greenwin social Sep 2025)
65_windermere.next_open_house: Use Greenwin 'Book a Tour' web form
65_windermere.honest_note: Rotating 1-month-free deal. Direct on-site line. CAUTION - Greenwin reputation mixed on pest control. Tour and ask current residents.

60_mountview.current_promo: 1 month free at end of first year lease
60_mountview.honest_note: Small private landlord (Beaux / High Park PM). EMAIL is fastest - owner responds within a day. Backup: 647-501-RENT (7368).

grenadier_square_40_high_park.next_open_house: Book tour via gwlraresidential.com 'Schedule a Tour' button
grenadier_square_40_high_park.honest_note: Toll-free leasing line + on-site dedicated office at 65 High Park next door. Easiest path: website tour form. GWLRA is institutional and responsive.

the_campbell_299_campbell.honest_note: BEST 6-DAY HOURS for ER - evenings to 7pm Tue-Thu, Sat to 6pm. Active 2-months-free promo. Call 833-660-4195 or use online form.

old_mill_station_2675_bloor.honest_note: ADDRESS UNCERTAIN - 2675 Bloor W does not match a known building; Old Mill Station condos are 1 Old Mill Dr and 2 Old Mill Dr. Use Del Condominium Rentals or browse Condos.ca for those addresses.

liberty_house_15_solidarity.honest_note: EXCELLENT 7-DAY hours, weeknights to 7pm. Direct on-site leasing line. Professional purpose-built rental in Liberty Village.

dna3_lofts.honest_note: Condo (1030 King W) with Rental Lifestyle Group running a managed rental pool - more centralized than typical condo. Use 416-593-5999 or the website form. Individual unit tours coordinated by their office.

m5v_condos_375_king_w.honest_note: Condo (375 King W) - no central leasing. Best path: browse Condos.ca rentals at this address and call listing agent. 416-979-0009 reaches building management. Backup rental brokers: 416-999-7671 or 416-799-9913.

pinnacle_grand_park_ii.honest_note: Condo (3975 Grand Park Dr). Del Condominium Rentals manages a centralized rental pool here - call 416-296-7368 first, then supplement with Condos.ca listings.

sherwood_towers_200_robert_speck.honest_note: Condo (200 Robert Speck Pkwy, built 1983). Building line 905-848-6745. Best path: browse Condos.ca + call the individual listing agent for tours.

the_crossways.current_promo: Check current listings (purpose-built rental with rotating incentives)
the_crossways.honest_note: Direct on-site rental office (2340-2360 Dundas W at Bloor). Email rentals@thecrossways.com - they respond same-day. Right at Dundas West subway.

junction_factory.current_promo: 1 MONTH FREE for eligible applicants; rent from $2,195
junction_factory.honest_note: STRONG 7-DAY hours, weekends 10-5. Realstar institutional landlord. Heat + Rogers Ignite 500 internet included. Best contact: phone 289-275-5477 OR Realstar contact form.

beechwood_480_lakeshore_e.honest_note: Older purpose-built rental (480 Lakeshore Rd E). NO PETS policy. Phone not on Realstar/Skyline portfolio - on-site number above is best-effort; verify on Apartments.com inquiry form. Use the inquiry form as the most reliable path.

Call 905-278-8030 for purpose-built side; for 215 specifically, also check Condos.ca.
